description_long: This object is a compact, military-style grenade launcher with a robust cylindrical body and a rotating drum magazine capable of holding multiple rounds. The main body is finished in olive drab green with metallic accents, and the drum magazine is loaded with gold-colored grenade shells. A black ergonomic pistol grip and a forward vertical grip provide stability and control, while a rail system runs along the top for mounting accessories. The front end features a short, wide barrel with a reinforced muzzle, and there are simple iron sights for aiming. The overall construction appears rugged, with visible screws, latches, and mechanical details indicating a functional, utilitarian design.
description: A compact, olive drab grenade launcher with a rotating drum magazine, black pistol grip, and metallic accents. Features include a short barrel, iron sights, and a robust, utilitarian build.
description_view_0: The front-left view highlights the wide barrel opening, the drum magazine with visible shells, and the top rail system.
description_view_1: The left-side view shows the full length of the launcher, the black pistol grip, and the forward vertical grip, as well as the arrangement of the drum magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the pistol grip and the back of the drum magazine, with the iron sight and latch mechanisms visible.
description_view_3: The right-side view displays the entire drum magazine, the forward grip, and the short barrel, emphasizing the launcher’s compactness.
